title: leads — permissions
description: Two audiences per hierarchy.md §4. Tenant plane (sanctum) — reception + marketing + admin + owner manage the CRM funnel; coach role sees only leads for their own athlete via policy narrowing; parent role never sees the surface. Platform plane (platform_admin) — ops + support read cross-tenant leads for support-ticket triage (never mutate). Every tenant-plane permission carries the `leads.` prefix (or `platform.leads.` on the platform audience).

permissions.name: leads.view
permissions.description: Reading a specific lead. Coach role narrowed to own athlete via policy.

permissions.name: leads.update
permissions.description: Marketing role restricted to leads they own via policy narrowing.

permissions.name: leads.assign
permissions.description: Assign / reassign a lead to a staff owner.

permissions.name: leads.convert
permissions.description: Trigger LeadConversionService — materialises athletes into sports::registrations and marks stage=WON.

permissions.name: lead-activities.create
permissions.description: Manually log a touchpoint. System-generated activities bypass this check.

permissions.name: lead-tasks.update
permissions.description: Edit title / due_at / priority / assignee. Assignee-only mutations for reception via policy.

permissions.name: lead-tasks.complete
permissions.description: Assignee-only via policy; admin + owner override.

permissions.name: leads.funnel-report.view
permissions.description: Access the funnel-conversion + source-attribution rollup dashboard.
